text.title: Micro MVPs Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Micro MVPs. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: frame-hypothesis
step.action: Compress to one falsifiable claim with numeric prediction.

step.name: ship-and-decide
step.action: At window-close: pull gate counts, decide go/kill/iterate.

decision-gate.p: After step 4, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
